name: Teoyube MVP User Interface Pages
description: MVP Next.js UI pages for dashboard, promise clusters, journal, AI companion, and word lexicon.

pages.name: Dashboard Page
pages.purpose: Daily spiritual growth center with Daily Word, Prayer, Promise Cluster, and AI Companion cards.

pages.name: Promise Clusters Page
pages.purpose: Lists Promise Clusters with core words, anchor Scripture, and declaration.

pages.name: Journal Page
pages.purpose: Provides a simple reflection form for Teoyube word, Scripture, and journal reflection.

pages.name: AI Companion Page
pages.purpose: Client-side companion form that posts user need to the AI companion API route.

pages.name: Word Lexicon Page
pages.purpose: Lists Teoyube words with meaning, category, promise statement, and Scripture references.

nextSteps: Connect dashboard cards to real Daily Word and Prayer data.
Add dynamic word detail pages at /words/[word].
Add dynamic cluster detail pages at /clusters/[id].
Connect companion responses to the full canon and OpenAI API.
